    INSERT_ADD_DROP_REQUEST
    "INSERT INTO AddDropRequest (userID, courseCode, type) VALUES (?, ?, ?)"

    INSERT_NOTIFICATION
    "INSERT INTO Notification (description, userID, type) VALUES (?, ?, ?)"

    "INSERT INTO OnlinePayment (paymentID, userID, CardNumber, expiryDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)"

    "INSERT INTO Transaction (paymentID, amount, modeofPayment, userID) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)"

    public static final String
    SELECT_ALL_COURSES
    "SELECT * FROM Course"

    SELECT_COURSE
    "SELECT * FROM Course WHERE courseCode = ?"
    public static final String
    SELECT_COURSES
    "SELECT * FROM Course"
    public static final String
    SELECT_ENROLLED_STUDENTS
    "SELECT * FROM GradeCard WHERE courseCode = ?"
    public static final String
    SELECT_GRADE_CARD
    "SELECT * FROM GradeCard WHERE userID = ?"
    public static final String
    SELECT_TEACHING_COURSES
    "SELECT * FROM Course WHERE userID = ?"
    public static final String
    SELECT_USER
    "SELECT * FROM User WHERE userID = ?"
    public static final String
    UPDATE_ADD_DROP_REQUEST_VIEW
    "UPDATE AddDropRequest SET view = 1 WHERE courseCode = ?"
    public static final String
    UPDATE_COURSE_DETAILS
    "UPDATE Course SET userID = ?, courseDescription = ? WHERE courseCode = ?"
    public static final String
    UPDATE_GRADE
    "UPDATE GradeCard SET grade = ? WHERE courseCode = ? AND userID = ?"
    public static final String
    UPDATE_PASSWORD
    "UPDATE User SET password = ? WHERE userID = ?"
    public static final String
    UPDATE_USER_APPROVAL
    "UPDATE User SET isApproved = ? WHERE userID = ?"
